title: Junior Frontend Developer at Amazon India

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Amazon India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Amazon India in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!
